raw_consumer_statement: Hi, this is XXXX XXXX. I have contacted Amex more than one hundred times about my fraud cases, and they are not standing by my side even though I have provided all details and proofs showing I was the victim of the fraud. They cancelled all my cards and asked me to be liable for all charges. There are XXXX charges that are fraudulent. XXXX is on the card ending in XXXX XXXX XXXX card. When the charge happened, I directly reponded to the alert message and specialist from amex gave me a call for all details. After several weeks, they asked me to be responsible for that. Second is on the XXXX XXXX XXXX ending in XXXX. My XXXX account was hacked and I lost the access to the XXXX account. XXXX confirmed that with me and sent me an email to prove the fraud. I forwarded the email to amex but they refused to use it. The third fraud was charged in XXXX that is insane. Please settle all these cases for me.
